title: Gpu Cpu Util
description:
On screen CPU GPU usage with Mod Menu settings.
Shows temps and more useful info
body:
**GpuCpu Util**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/Gpu-Cpu-Util)
--- it's a lightweight performance overlay for Minecraft that displays real-time CPU, GPU, and FPS information directly on your screen. I recommend using [exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) for more fps! it boosted mine from 1.3k to 2.6k [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for settings Designed for simplicity and customization, it includes: • Live CPU & GPU usage percentages • GPU temperature monitoring • FPS counter with optional animation • Toggleable name displays for CPU & GPU • Optional colored and animated text modes for better visual clarity _Do note the animated mode can reduce framerate in certain situations._ • Full configuration support via Mod Menu + Cloth Config Built for Minecraft 1.21+, it runs purely client-side and does not affect gameplay. perfect for players who want a clean, informative performance readout while playing or testing mods. [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
